hooks.name: Post-Ingest Spot Check
hooks.description: After a PDF is successfully ingested, run a quick RAGAS spot-check on 5 sample questions from the test dataset to verify the new document integrates well.

hooks.name: Save Conversation to Feedback Store
hooks.description: When a chat session ends, save the full conversation (queries + responses) to the feedback store for later fine-tuning export.

hooks.name: Render RAGAS Scores + Alert
hooks.description: After a RAGAS evaluation run completes, update the evaluation dashboard and alert if any metric is below threshold.

alert.message: RAGAS Gate FAILED: one or more metrics below threshold. Review before deploying.

hooks.name: Auto Re-run Evaluation on Config Change
hooks.description: When config/rag.yaml or config/slm.yaml is saved, automatically re-run the full RAGAS evaluation to measure the impact of the change.

hooks.name: Re-run Evaluation After Document Refresh
hooks.description: After a document is re-ingested (refreshed), run evaluation filtered to questions related to that document.
